allow: PowerShell($dest = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dest | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://nodejs.org/dist/v24.16.0/node-v24.16.0-win-x64.zip" -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\node.zip"; Expand-Archive -Path "$env:TEMP\\node.zip" -DestinationPath $dest -Force; if \(Test-Path "$dest\\nodejs"\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$dest\\nodejs" }; Rename-Item "$dest\\node-v24.16.0-win-x64" "nodejs"; & "$dest\\nodejs\\node.exe" --version)

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs;$env:Path"; npm install; npm install @supabase/supabase-js d3-zoom d3-selection fractional-indexing fflate @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities; npm install -D vitest @types/d3-zoom @types/d3-selection)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs;$env:Path"; npm install d3-transition; npm install -D @types/d3-transition)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs;$env:Path"; npx tsc --noEmit; if \($?\) { npm run lint; if \($?\) { npm run build } })

PowerShell($ok = $false; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000 } }; if \($ok\) { "landing: 200"; $setup = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/c/local/setup" -UseBasicParsing; "setup: $\($setup.StatusCode\)"; $main = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/c/local" -UseBasicParsing; "main: $\($main.StatusCode\)" } else { "server did not start" })
